---
title: "李曼娜的个人主页"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
# 关于我

## 基本信息

- <i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> **学号**：2025303110096  
- <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> **专业**：植物营养学  
- <i class="bi bi-tags"></i> **标签**：<i class="bi bi-heart-fill" style="color: #e74c3c;"></i> 热爱生活 · <i class="bi bi-emoji-smile" style="color: #f39c12;"></i> 乐观开朗 · <i class="bi bi-brightness-high" style="color: #f1c40f;"></i> 阳光向上
